# paymentMethod

**Instance Property**

Information about the card used in the transaction.

## Declaration

```swift
required ApplePayPaymentMethod paymentMethod;
```

## Discussion

See [doc://com.apple.applepayontheweb/documentation/ApplePayontheWeb/ApplePayPaymentMethod].

## Payment Token Properties

- **paymentData**: An object containing the encrypted payment data.
- **transactionIdentifier**: A unique identifier for this payment.
